name: Chocolate Buttercream Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the margarine and cocoa in a medium bowl. Mix well until combined.
2. Slowly add the powdered sugar, mixing well after each addition.
3. Add the vanilla extract and continue to mix until the frosting is smooth and creamy.
4. For a darker frosting color, add 7 drops of red food coloring and 2 drops of green food coloring. Mix until desired shade is achieved.
